steps.catalog_description: Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Restore STS from a backup file in sts/backups/. Shell: apply_hart_seed.sh for hart_seed.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

Auto-generate car orders for due shipments. Default matches generate.php AUTOMATIC (increment session + generate). Set Increment session=No to generate for the current session only. Or set Shipment for a single manual order. Max unfilled orders skips generation entirely when the unfilled backlog is above the limit (hard gate). Max new orders/session is a soft cap: it still generates every session but stops after that many new orders, serving due shipments in random order and leaving the rest due for later — this spreads demand smoothly and avoids the burst-then-starve pattern a hard gate causes. Optional Random seed (e.g. 42) reproduces the same due-shipment mix after each restore.

Count unfilled outbound coke orders (USS/CLEV singles and bulk). When below target minimum, generate single-car COKE-USS / COKE-CLEV orders alternating lanes until the minimum is met (capped at target maximum).
Auto-assign eligible cars to open orders (same as Fill Car Orders → Auto Assign). Uses car source checkboxes and optional order/car filters. Set Percent to limit how many orders are filled.
Reposition empty cars: send off-home cars home, or update with a chosen destination.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Legacy — use Assign Cars instead. Assign ordered cars at a station to a job/train (by-station switch list build).
steps.description: Test: Build Switch Lists (Demmler Yard CK1)

steps.catalog_description: Legacy — use Assign Cars instead. Assign ordered cars at a station to a job/train (by-station switch list build).
steps.description: Test: Build Switch Lists (East Yard D749)

steps.catalog_description: Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits picks to one yard.
Assign eligible cars to selected job(s)/train(s). Hold Ctrl/Cmd to select multiple. Optional station filter limits picks to one yard.
Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).
steps.description: Test: Pick Up Cars (CK1 Demmler Yard)

steps.catalog_description: Pick up assigned cars onto a job train. Optional car filters match the Pick Up Cars page. Leave job blank for all locals (staging excluded).

Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to assign each car to its loading or unloading location (same as Assign on set_out.php). Pick a yard to set out all matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.
steps.description: Test: Set Out Cars (CK1 East Yard)

steps.catalog_description: Set out cars from a job train. Choose Final Destination to assign each car to its loading or unloading location (same as Assign on set_out.php). Pick a yard to set out all matching train cars there. Optional car filters match the Set Out Cars page. Leave job and location blank for all locals.

Recalibrate the coke track scale. Performs a fresh random calibration when required (first use / out of service) or when the configured number of sessions have elapsed since the last calibration. Set to 1 to calibrate every session (steady ~15% reload routing); higher values let scale drift accumulate so more cars route to reload between calibrations. Run this before the Track Scale weigh step.
Weigh loaded cars on a job train (or at the scale) for the selected commodity. Uses track scale config when commodity is blank.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Complete offline load/unload transitions. Optional filters mirror the STS load/unload page.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Write switch list HTML for the current simulator state for selected job(s) or all.
Render printable waybill HTML for open waybills in the current session.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).
Export current database to sts/backups/. GUI: backup_db.php.
Check STS for broken links and data integrity. GUI: validate_db.php.
Advance session number by 1. GUI: generate.php (Next Session).
Import tables from CSV. GUI: import_tables.php.
Restart shippers, cancel waybills, release all cars. GUI: restart.php.
Restart session and reset all cars. GUI: reset.php.
Delete a backup file from sts/backups/. GUI: remove_backup.php.
Section heading with optional remarks (non-operational).

When the condition is true, skip forward to a later section. When false, continue to the next step. Variables match the Operations dashboard counts (session #, open/unfilled orders, unassigned, pickup/set-out pending, organize, scale, load/unload).
